workspaceFree.intro: Feature requests and inbox are open on the free plan. Help Me Create — personalized plotting support — is for Pro members.
workspaceFree.introPro: Help, feedback, and your support inbox.
workspaceFree.createLockedTitle: Help Me Create is for Pro
workspaceFree.createLockedBody: Personalized help with boards, routines, and plotting support unlocks with Palette Plotting Pro.

create.intro: Share only what feels relevant. Palette Plotting will turn this into board prompts, plan steps, or a routine.
create.successBody: We'll reply by in-app inbox (best if you set notifications on) and/or email. If you need something urgently, you can also email
create.focusLabel: What are you working on right now?
create.focusPlaceholder: Tell us what you're plotting and where you're stuck.
create.helpTypeLabel: What do you need help with?
create.footer: Please submit what feels most relevant. Palette Plotting will aim to reply within 24 to 48 hours of your request. You may also reach out to us at support@paletteplot.com.

supportForm.successBody: We aim to respond within 24–48 hours by in-app inbox (best if you set notifications on) and/or email. If you need something urgently, you can also email
supportForm.purchaseChannelPlaceholder: Apple App Store, Google Play, or Web
supportForm.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened, what should change, or what would help?
supportForm.appleRefundNote: Apple ultimately controls payments and refunds; however we will try our best to help you.
supportForm.screenshotsHint: Up to {{max}} files · HEIC, JPG, PNG, WebP, etc. · max 5 MB each
supportForm.contactFooter: You may also reach out to us at support@paletteplot.com.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Your submitted requests and replies from Palette Plotting. New requests start on the other tabs.
inbox.empty: No requests yet. Submit on Help Me Create or App Support & Feedback — replies will show up here.

toasts.maxAttachments: You can add up to {{max}} images.
toasts.unsupportedImage: {{name}} is not a supported image type.
toasts.fileTooLarge: {{name}} is too large (max 5 MB per file).
toasts.choosePurchaseChannel: Please select where you purchased (Apple App Store, Google Play, or Web).
toasts.descriptionMinLength: Please enter at least {{min}} characters in the description.
toasts.shareFocus: Please share what you're working on or trying to change.
toasts.chooseHelpType: Please choose what you need help with.
toasts.addMoreDetail: Please add a bit more detail.
